case_title: KELSTIN GROUP, INC. VS. PAUL ERNEST EULALIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ACCRUED INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 64816291) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELSTIN GROUP, INC. DBA PACIFIC CREDIT SERVICES
DECLARATION OF LYLE D. SOLOMON IN REPONSE TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 65669437) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELSTIN GROUP, INC. DBA PACIFIC CREDIT SERVICES

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELSTIN GROUP, INC. DBA PACIFIC CREDIT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT EULALIA, PAUL ERNEST DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-06-2020
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64816291) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 64816291), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELSTIN GROUP, INC. DBA PACIFIC CREDIT SERVICES SERVED JAN-11-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EULALIA, PAUL ERNEST
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 65735862)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-23-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64816291) AS TO DEFENDANT EULALIA, PAUL ERNEST

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELSTIN GROUP, INC. DBA PACIFIC CREDIT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EULALIA, PAUL ERNEST $9,819.38 PRINCIPAL, $1,032.96 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,137.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 64816291)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-23-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
